analytical_questions: Obj1: Analyze hospital admission rates by age and gender
Obj1: Calculate utilization ratios to identify over/under-represented demographic groups
Obj1: Detect temporal trends — are disparities widening or narrowing over 2006-2020?
Obj3: Compare utilization against expected need (need-adjusted analysis)
Obj1: Analyze primary care utilization disparities by sex
Obj1: Assess health screening uptake gaps between male and female populations
Obj3: Identify underserved demographics with low preventive care utilization
Obj1: Analyze long-term care access trends by care type
Obj3: Diagnose potential access barriers for elderly population (nursing home demand vs supply)
Obj2: Analyze mortality rate disparities by gender for cancer
Obj2: Quantify disease burden differences (cancer mortality) across demographics
Obj2: Identify preventable cancer mortality gaps between male and female populations
Obj2: Analyze stroke mortality rate disparities by gender
Obj2: Quantify preventable stroke mortality gap between male and female
Obj2: Analyze IHD mortality disparities by gender (largest absolute gap)
Obj2: Quantify ischaemic heart disease preventable mortality gap
Obj4: Identify high-risk male demographic requiring targeted cardiac prevention programs

extraction_summary.data_source_note: Synthetic data (schema-faithful, calibrated to MOH Singapore published statistics). Extractor automatically uses live Kaggle data when network/credentials are available.

recommended_cleaning_steps: Standardise age group labels: remove spaces from "0 - 4" format to "0-4"
Validate sex categories: ensure only Male/Female (no mixed case, abbreviations, or totals)
Temporal alignment: create 2006-2019 subset for cross-dataset joins (overlapping period)
Rate base normalisation: document rate bases clearly (admissions per 1,000; mortality per 100,000)
Calculate disparity ratios: male/female admission rates by age group and year
Flag temporal outliers: identify years with >3σ deviation from rolling mean per demographic
Join preparation: create year+sex composite key for multi-dataset equity joins
LTC limitation note: document lack of sex stratification in LTC data as analysis constraint
next_agent_instructions: All 6 equity datasets are extracted and validated. Begin with hospital_admissions (primary dataset) as it is the core utilization equity metric. Key cleaning priority: standardise age groups and align temporal coverage to 2006-2019. Disparity ratio calculation (male/female admission rate by age group) is the primary analytical output. See docs/data-dictionary/equity_extracted.md for full schema and recommended filters.
